poll.question: Judy is finally in their circle. Should the group gently ask what hurt her, deepening trust—or protect this fragile peace by asking nothing tonight?

options.label: Ask what hurt
options.desc: Push gently for vulnerability; know Judy fully

options.label: Keep it gentle
options.desc: Let presence and safety be enough; protect this peace

options.label: Make a pact
options.desc: Use this moment to commit—we stay together, no matter what

in_play.label: Reach to Marcus
in_play.desc: Her courage could be contagious—pull him in before the distance hardens
